task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the NOSH ChartingSystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or logged-in interface indicating a successful login with the admin account.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the address book and opened the form to add a new specialist or contact.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form, modal, or page titled 'Add Specialist', 'Address Book', 'New Contact', or similar within the NOSH interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct name, credentials, and specialty.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Rebecca' (First Name), 'Torres' (Last Name), 'Dr. Rebecca M. Torres' (Display Name), 'Cardiology' (Specialty), and 'MD, FACC' (Credential/Suffix) populated in the respective form fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct NPI and Organization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '1477658923' (NPI) and 'Springfield Heart Center' (Organization/Facility) populated in the respective form fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct phone, fax, and email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '413-555-7890' (Phone), '413-555-7891' (Fax), and 'rtorres@springfieldheartcenter.org' (Email) populated in the respective form fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct address and successfully saved the specialist entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '450 Carew Street, Suite 300' (Street), 'Springfield' (City), 'MA' (State), and '01104' (Zip) in the address fields. Additionally, look for a success message, a closed form, or the new contact appearing in the saved address book list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the NOSH web interface via a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser displaying the NOSH ChartingSystem UI. The agent should not be using terminal commands, database injections, or cURL scripts to add the entry.

integrity.description: Verify the data was entered into the actual NOSH application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the form fields are part of the NOSH web application and not a generic text editor, notepad, or a locally created HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the final address book entry appears genuine and was not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the layout, styling, and fonts of the saved entry match the NOSH system's standard UI and do not look like manually edited HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves NOSH ChartingSystem. Verified geographic details for the address: City is Springfield, State is MA, and ZIP code is 01104.
